name: Fountain High-Volume Hiring API
what_it_does: Fountain REST API for high-volume hourly worker recruiting and applicant tracking. Enables AI agents to manage applicant workflows, trigger stage transitions, collect background check and document verification data, schedule interviews, and integrate frontline hiring with HRIS and workforce management systems. Fountain specializes in gig economy, logistics, retail, and hospitality high-volume recruiting.
use_cases: Managing applicant pipelines and stage transitions from recruiting automation agents
Triggering background checks and verification from onboarding workflow agents
Scheduling interviews and orientations from high-volume hiring agents
Syncing hired candidates with HRIS and payroll from integration agents
not_for: Professional/knowledge worker recruiting without high-volume focus
Complex enterprise ATS with competency-based assessment
Non-hourly/gig workforce without frontline hiring workflows
best_when: A logistics, retail, hospitality, or gig economy company wants AI agents to automate high-volume hourly worker recruiting, screening, and onboarding at scale.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Applicant personal data including background checks and documents is highly sensitive. FCRA compliance required for background check results.

auth.notes: Fountain uses API key authentication in the Authorization Bearer header. Keys are account-scoped. Simple authentication for integration development.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise high-volume hiring pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts per hires-per-month volume
pricing.notes: Enterprise high-volume hiring platform. Developer-friendly REST API. Used by Instacart, McDonald's, and similar companies for hourly hiring at scale.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Applicant data including background checks and documents — FCRA compliance required
No public MCP server — REST API with Bearer token key
FCRA compliance for background check data: adverse action notices required
Stage-based workflow model — each hiring stage has specific triggers and requirements
No granular scopes — API key provides broad account access
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Applicant PII and background check data. SOC2, FCRA compliance. US-only. API key auth — no granular scopes.

security_score_components.security_notes: Applicant PII and background check data. SOC2, FCRA. US-only. API key auth. No granular scopes.
